verification_method: same-model clean-context adversarial frame per program.md §9
results_summary: Verifier re-applied mechanical rule. Agrees on 6 forced hits. Disagrees on agent-judged: verifier says ACM 2816815 'Power Law Distributions in IR' has only overlap=1 strictly and downgrades primary's agent-judged hit on that one to miss; verifier also disputes primary's agent-judged hit on 2504.07104. Verdict: still FAIL because 6 forced hits suffice.

disagreement_details.implication: Primary over-strict in the lenient direction; verifier strict-substring keeps it at overlap=1=miss.
